wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Fira Sans',sans-serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#0f172a!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#0284c7!important;box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(2,132,199,.4)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{padding:14px 24px!important;color:#38bdf8!important;letter-spacing:.03em;transition:all .25s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:0;background:#0284c7;transition:width .25s ease;z-index:-1;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover::before{width:100%;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover{color:#ffffff!important;} #wprmenu_menu_ul li{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.08)!important;} .tech-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c4a6e,#0284c7);padding:26px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.2);position:relative;overflow:hidden;} .tech-header::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:-30px;top:-30px;width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.15);} .tech-header .chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(56,189,248,.12);border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.3);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 10px;margin-bottom:10px;} .tech-header .chip span{color:#38bdf8;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;} .tech-header h4{color:#f0f9ff;font-size:17px;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 3px;} .tech-header p{color:#7dd3fc;font-size:12px;margin:0;letter-spacing:.03em;} .tech-footer{padding:14px 24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.1);display:flex;gap:10px;} .tech-footer a{width:32px;height:32px;border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.25);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#38bdf8!important;font-size:13px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .2s;} .tech-footer a:hover{background:#0284c7;border-color:#0284c7;color:#ffffff!important;}
content_before_menu_element:
